templates.description: Recursion tree with per-level cost annotations — useful for algorithm complexity analysis, divide-and-conquer breakdowns, or any diagram showing recursive decomposition

Finite state machine with labeled transitions and background grouping boxes — useful for protocol lifecycles, system modes, workflow states, network connections, or any process with named states and triggers
Grid-based truth-table simplification diagram — useful for Boolean logic minimisation, digital circuit design, or any combinatorial optimisation problem displayed as a 2D grid
